subcodes.first_line: The numerous epistles from your eminence have been received into Our presence, and this servant hath made mention of all that was recorded concerning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتب عدیده آنجناب لدی الوجه حاضر و تمام آن را عبد حاضر مذکور داشت آنچه در وصف
subcodes.subjects: @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
